race.comment: ZEALANDS PRINCESS (7) improving filly who rounded them up with ridiculous ease to get off the mark at start four in good style over 1000m at this track. Will keep improving as she gets out in trip and can race closer from the good gate. Can go right on with the job now. STARVERNA (5) bounced off the good debut win, with a fast-finishing second from the wide barrier over 1100m at Scone. Finds a weaker contest but drawn out again. Will be launching late. GOLDEN VADER (6) snagged back from the poor gate and closed strongly from back in the field with a plugging sixth over 1100m at Scone. Best figures measure up nicely and has solid winning claims from the inside marble. RUBY HARMONY (10) will strip fitter for this after resuming with a battling sixth over 1000m at Parkes. Gets in light again with the claim and stays in the calculations.
